message:
refactor(pager): introduce StagedPage to co-locate write-set buffer and published snapshot

Replace raw `HashMap<PageNumber, PageBuf>` write-set with
`HashMap<PageNumber, StagedPage>` throughout the transaction and commit
paths. StagedPage pairs the mutable PageBuf with a pre-built
PageData clone, eliminating redundant Vec allocations on every
`get_page` read of a dirty page and during snapshot publication.

- Add `StagedPage` struct with `from_buf`, `from_bytes`,
  `as_page_bytes`, `published_page`, and `into_buf` accessors
- Extract `insert_staged_page` helper to encapsulate write-set
  insertion + sorted-page-list maintenance
- Update `serialize_freelist_to_write_set`,
  `ensure_page_one_in_write_set`, `collect_wal_commit_batch`,
  `commit_journal`, `commit_wal`, `write_page`, savepoint
  save/rollback, and snapshot publication to use StagedPage
- Update tests to construct StagedPage via `from_buf`

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
